sections.paragraph:
(“crowns”), [Ataroth], pr.n.-

(1) of a town in the tribe of Gad, Num 32:3, 34 Num 32:34.-(2) of another in the tribe of Ephraim, Jos 16:7 also called עַטְרֹות־אַדָּר (“crowns of Addar”), Jos 16:5 18:13 .-(3) עַטְרֹות בֵּית יֹואָב (“crowns of the house of Joab”), a town in the tribe of Judah, 1Ch 2:54.-(4) עַטְרֹות שֹׁופָן a town in the tribe of Gad, Num 32:35.
